action.reasoning: Observation: train.py has a syntax error - `if __name__ == "__main__":n` should have a newline after the colon, not literal 'n'. Analysis: Simple typo from previous write. Also, SubprocVecEnv caused ConnectionResetError before. Decision: Fix the syntax error and switch to DummyVecEnv to avoid multiprocessing issues with MuJoCo. Start with fewer timesteps (100k) for a quick baseline across all 10 tasks.
